FADE IN:

EXT. XANADU - NIGHT

A small boy plays in the snow. His mother, wearing a white dress, plays with him.

CHARLES FOSTER KANE (age 8)
What does "Rosebud" mean?

MARY KANE
It's a sled I gave you when you were very little.

INT. XANADU - LIBRARY - NIGHT

Kane, now old, drops a snow globe. It shatters.

CUT TO:

INT. INQUIRER OFFICE - DAY

A reporter types at his desk. Thompson approaches.

THOMPSON
What's the "Rosebud" angle?

REPORTER
I don't know. Nobody knows.

CUT TO:

EXT. MEMORY MONTAGE - VARIOUS

We see flashes: Kane's marriage, his political career, his newspaper empire.

INT. XANADU - KANE'S BEDROOM - DAWN

Kane lies dying. He grips the snow globe.

KANE
Rosebud...

He dies. The camera PULLS BACK through the window, showing the vast estate.

DISSOLVE TO:

EXT. XANADU - GROUNDS - DAWN

Workers burn sleds and belongings. One sled with the word "ROSEBUD" is thrown into the furnace.

FADE OUT.

THE END

— 角色表 —
CHARLES FOSTER KANE ──── 主角
MARY KANE ──── 主角母亲
THOMPSON ──── 记者
REPORTER ──── 配角

— 场景统计 —
EXT. 场景: 3
INT. 场景: 3
FADE IN/OUT: 2
CUT TO: 3
